summary: Record the production web build after AI context toggles and the deterministic aggregate timing-test correction.

decisions.decision: Retain the successful production bundle as local compile/package evidence only; hosted browser, native, Windows Sandbox, and owner similarity gates remain separate.
decisions.rationale: A local Vite bundle cannot prove clean-host lifecycle or isolated similarity behavior, and N-7 forbids conflating those evidence classes.

testEvidence.criterion: The current committed tree compiles and bundles for the production web target.
testEvidence.test: Run the production build once after the final aggregate-green correction.

red.outcome: RED: no failed build was observed before this verification; the final post-correction build had not yet run.

green.outcome: GREEN: tsc exited 0; Vite transformed 233 modules and completed in 348ms.

questions: M4 still requires the hosted/clean-host evidence gates and any remaining C11/MCP acceptance before milestone closure.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
